<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><rss version="2.0" xmlns:content="http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/content/" xmlns:wfw="http://wellformedweb.org/CommentAPI/" xmlns:dc="http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/" xmlns:atom="http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom" xmlns:sy="http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/syndication/" xmlns:slash="http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/slash/" xmlns:media="http://search.yahoo.com/mrss/" xmlns:job_listing="https://jobicy.com"
 >

<channel>
	<title>Jobicy's Feed</title>
	<atom:link href="https://jobicy.com/?feed=job_feed&job_categories=dev&job_types=remote&search_keywords=react" rel="self" type="application/rss+xml" />
	<link>https://jobicy.com</link>
	<description>Jobicy</description>
	<lastBuildDate>Wed, 15 Apr 2026 16:52:11 +0000</lastBuildDate>
	<language>en-US</language>
	<legalNotice>We appreciate your use of Jobicy Feeds in your projects! Please note that our RSS/XML access is designed primarily to facilitate broader distribution of our content. To ensure that Jobicy is credited as the original source across various platforms, our content is published with a 6-hour delay. As our data doesn't change frequently, accessing the Feed a few times daily is sufficient and recommended. Be advised that excessive querying may lead to restricted access. Thank you for understanding and cooperating!</legalNotice>
	<sy:updatePeriod>hourly</sy:updatePeriod>
	<sy:updateFrequency>1</sy:updateFrequency>
	
</channel>
</rss>
